title: Tunisian Pear Tagine
description: A comforting and sweet stew originating from Tunisia, made with tender pears and aromatic spices.

ingredients.name: Pears
ingredients.notes: any variety, but firmer pears work best

instructions: Peel, core, and slice the pears into 1-inch pieces.
In a large Dutch oven or heavy pot, melt the butter over medium heat.
Add the sliced ginger and cook for 1-2 minutes, until fragrant.
Add the cinnamon, allspice, and salt; cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Add the sliced pears, honey, and water to the pot.
Bring the mixture to a boil, then cover the pot and transfer it to the preheated oven.
Bake for 25-30 minutes, or until the pears are tender and the liquid has thickened into a syrup.
Stir in the sliced almonds and cook for an additional 2-3 minutes.
Serve the tagine warm, topped with additional almonds and honey if desired.
